<!-- Peblla Marketing Team Knowledge Base — Auto-generated from group chat learnings -->

# Content Review Workflow

## Overview (Permanent — 张彭文佳, 2026-03-25)

All content follows a two-gate review process before publication:

```
Role produces content
  → Devil's Advocate (automatic challenge)
    → Fail → Auto-return for revision → Re-challenge → Loop (max 3 rounds)
    → Pass → Safer visual review
      → Pass → Post to group chat for Kristin team review
      → Fail → Revise and re-submit
```

**Content that has not passed both Devil's Advocate + Safer review may never be published.**

## Gate 1: Devil's Advocate (Mandatory — All Roles)

### Mechanism

After each role completes a deliverable, a subagent automatically activates as the "Devil's Advocate" to challenge the work.

### Challenge Dimensions by Role

See [Content Review Checklist](../methodology/content-review-checklist.md) for the full dimension breakdown per role.

### Failure Handling

1. Devil's Advocate outputs a specific issue list
2. Original role automatically revises
3. Re-submitted for another challenge round
4. **Maximum 3 rounds** — if still failing after 3 rounds, the content + issue list are posted to the group chat requesting human intervention

### Pass Criteria

All applicable challenge dimensions must be satisfied. Only then does the content proceed to Gate 2.

## Gate 2: Safer Visual Review

### Scope

All images, videos, and visual materials from any role.

### Review Points

| Check | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| Hardware appearance | Matches correct SUNMI prototype |
| Logo removal | SUNMI logo completely removed |
| Brand elements | Peblla identity correctly applied |
| Image quality | Resolution, composition, color standards met |
| Content safety | No inappropriate content |
| Copyright | No copyright risks |

### Process

- Safer review is **automatic** — no human reminder needed
- Fail → Role self-corrects → Re-submit → Loop until pass
- Pass → Content posted to group chat

## Full Pipeline

```
Content Creation
  ↓
Devil's Advocate Challenge (auto, max 3 rounds)
  ↓
Safer Visual Review (auto)
  ↓
Post to Group Chat
  ↓
Kristin Team Final Review
  ↓
Publish / Deploy
```
